web_sources.title: 3Blue1Brown Neural Networks series
web_sources.use: Conceptual visual foundation for networks, gradients, attention, and transformers.
web_sources.error: 404 Client Error: Not Found for url: https://www.3blue1brown.com/topics/neural-networks

web_sources.title: Jay Alammar, The Illustrated Transformer
web_sources.use: First-pass architecture map: embeddings, attention, encoder/decoder blocks.

web_sources.title: Stephen Wolfram, What Is ChatGPT Doing?
web_sources.use: Nontechnical explanation of next-token prediction, embeddings, and generated structure.

web_sources.title: Andrej Karpathy, Let's build GPT
web_sources.use: Implementation-oriented mental model for attention, blocks, loss, and training.
web_sources.error: Video source; not downloaded as PDF.

web_sources.title: Jurafsky and Martin, Speech and Language Processing
web_sources.use: Textbook spine for neural NLP, transformers, embeddings, extraction, and QA.

web_sources.title: Vaswani et al., Attention Is All You Need
web_sources.use: Original transformer architecture; read for attention, positional encoding, and residual blocks.

web_sources.title: Lena Voita, NLP Course
web_sources.use: Careful course notes for embeddings, attention, transfer learning, and analysis.

web_sources.title: Kaplan et al., Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models
web_sources.use: Why model behavior changes predictably with compute, data, and parameter count.

web_sources.title: Hoffmann et al., Training Compute-Optimal Large Language Models
web_sources.use: Chinchilla correction: data/parameter ratio matters, not just parameter count.

web_sources.title: Ouyang et al., Training Language Models to Follow Instructions
web_sources.use: Instruction tuning and RLHF; explains why production LLMs are not raw predictors.

web_sources.title: Bai et al., Constitutional AI
web_sources.use: AI-feedback alignment and model priors relevant to Claude-backed extraction.

web_sources.title: Elhage et al., A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits
web_sources.use: Mechanistic decomposition of transformer computations into circuits.

web_sources.title: Elhage et al., Toy Models of Superposition
web_sources.use: Why features can be polysemantic and why a clean coherence direction may not exist.

web_sources.title: Templeton et al., Scaling Monosemanticity
web_sources.use: Sparse autoencoders and interpretable features in a production-scale model.

web_sources.title: Olah et al., Distill Circuits thread
web_sources.use: Methodological ancestor of circuit-level interpretability.

web_sources.title: Belinkov and Glass, Analysis Methods in Neural Language Processing
web_sources.use: Taxonomy of probing and behavioral analysis methods.

web_sources.title: 3Blue1Brown Essence of Linear Algebra
web_sources.use: Geometric intuition for vectors, bases, eigenvectors, and transformations.
web_sources.error: 404 Client Error: Not Found for url: https://www.3blue1brown.com/topics/linear-algebra

web_sources.title: MIT OCW 18.06 Linear Algebra
web_sources.use: Formal linear algebra backbone for embeddings and transformations.

web_sources.title: Jay Alammar, The Illustrated Word2vec
web_sources.use: Visual bridge from words to distributed vectors.

web_sources.title: Mikolov et al., Efficient Estimation of Word Representations
web_sources.use: Historical source for learned word embeddings as semantic objects.

web_sources.title: Jurafsky and Martin, Chapter 6: Vector Semantics and Embeddings
web_sources.use: PPMI, SVD, word2vec, GloVe, and embedding evaluation.

web_sources.title: Pennington et al., GloVe
web_sources.use: Co-occurrence matrix factorization view of embeddings.

web_sources.title: Reimers and Gurevych, Sentence-BERT
web_sources.use: Sentence-level embeddings, directly relevant to claim and principle vectors.

web_sources.title: Cuturi and Peyre, Computational Optimal Transport
web_sources.use: Distribution-level geometry for comparing clouds of embeddings.

web_sources.title: Bronstein et al., Geometric Deep Learning
web_sources.use: Unifies learning under symmetry across grids, graphs, manifolds, and transformers.

web_sources.title: Fefferman et al., Testing the Manifold Hypothesis
web_sources.use: Mathematical version of the claim that high-dimensional data lies on low-dimensional structure.

web_sources.title: Park, Choe, and Veitch, Linear Representation Hypothesis
web_sources.use: Formal backbone for treating concepts as linear directions in LLM representations.

web_sources.title: Marks and Tegmark, Geometry of Truth
web_sources.use: Empirical truth directions in LLM activation space.

web_sources.title: Burns et al., Discovering Latent Knowledge without Supervision
web_sources.use: Contrast-consistent search and logical consistency directions.

web_sources.title: Zou et al., Representation Engineering
web_sources.use: Practical direction-finding and direction-steering toolkit.

web_sources.title: Manning et al., Computational Linguistics and Deep Learning
web_sources.use: Deep learning transition in NLP.

web_sources.title: Advanced NLP with spaCy
web_sources.use: Classical pipeline implementation: tokenization, NER, dependency parsing, matching.

web_sources.title: Natural Language Processing with Python
web_sources.use: Friendly introduction to rule-based and statistical NLP pipelines.

web_sources.title: Jurafsky and Martin, Chapter 18: Information Extraction
web_sources.use: NER, relation extraction, event extraction, temporal expressions.

web_sources.title: Devlin et al., BERT
web_sources.use: Pretrained bidirectional encoder behind modern extraction systems.

web_sources.title: Lee et al., End-to-end Neural Coreference Resolution
web_sources.use: Coreference as a prerequisite for clean graph nodes.

web_sources.title: Cabot and Navigli, REBEL
web_sources.use: Relation extraction by sequence generation.

web_sources.title: Wang et al., Neural Relation Extraction Survey
web_sources.use: Survey of relation extraction approaches before instruction-tuned LLMs.

web_sources.title: Wadhwa et al., Information Extraction from LLMs
web_sources.use: Zero/few-shot LLM extraction behavior and failure modes.

web_sources.title: Qiao et al., Reasoning with Language Model Prompting
web_sources.use: Prompting survey: decomposition, chain-of-thought, self-consistency, tools.

web_sources.title: Lewis et al., Retrieval-Augmented Generation
web_sources.use: Retrieval-grounded generation and knowledge-intensive tasks.

web_sources.title: Stab and Gurevych, Parsing Argumentation Structures
web_sources.use: Claims, premises, support relations, and argument mining.

web_sources.title: Hogan et al., Knowledge Graphs
web_sources.use: Knowledge graph handbook: data models, identity, quality, refinement.

web_sources.title: NetworkX tutorial
web_sources.use: Practical graph representation and traversal operations used in Noosphere.

web_sources.title: Diestel, Graph Theory
web_sources.use: Formal graph-theory reference. Full downloadable PDF was not assumed from mirrors.

web_sources.title: SEP, Coherentist Theories of Epistemic Justification
web_sources.use: Philosophical target: coherence as justification, not automatically truth.

web_sources.title: SEP, Coherence Theory of Truth
web_sources.use: Distinguishes coherence-as-truth from coherence-as-justification.

web_sources.title: Bordes et al., TransE
web_sources.use: Knowledge-graph embeddings as translation in vector space.

web_sources.title: Wang et al., Knowledge Graph Embedding Survey
web_sources.use: KG embedding vocabulary and model taxonomy; page cached, full IEEE PDF not public here.

web_sources.title: SEP, Paraconsistent Logic
web_sources.use: Reasoning without explosion under contradiction.

web_sources.title: SEP, Mereology
web_sources.use: Part-whole relations for principle distillation and claim composition.

web_sources.title: SEP, Logic of Belief Revision
web_sources.use: Formal belief update and revision.

web_sources.title: Nickel et al., Relational Machine Learning for Knowledge Graphs
web_sources.use: Relational learning, latent-feature models, and graph-feature models.

web_sources.title: Lin et al., TruthfulQA
web_sources.use: Truthfulness benchmark for models that mimic human falsehoods.

web_sources.title: Li et al., Inference-Time Intervention
web_sources.use: Intervening on attention-head directions correlated with truthfulness.

web_sources.title: Thagard, Coherence as Constraint Satisfaction
web_sources.use: Computational coherentism as network constraint satisfaction; page cached, full text not public here.

web_sources.title: Olsson et al., In-context Learning and Induction Heads
web_sources.use: Circuit-level explanation of a concrete in-context learning behavior.

web_sources.title: Blitzstein and Hwang, Introduction to Probability / Stat 110
web_sources.use: Probability prerequisite for calibration, Bayesian updates, and uncertainty.

web_sources.title: MIT OCW 18.02 Multivariable Calculus
web_sources.use: Calculus prerequisite for gradients and optimization.

web_sources.title: MacKay, Information Theory, Inference, and Learning Algorithms
web_sources.use: Information theory and probabilistic inference primer.

web_sources.title: Boyd and Vandenberghe, Convex Optimization
web_sources.use: Optimization primer for training objectives and convex geometry.

web_sources.title: Pan et al., Unifying Large Language Models and Knowledge Graphs
web_sources.use: Current roadmap for KG-enhanced LLMs, LLM-augmented KGs, and synergized systems.

web_sources.title: Bian, LLM-empowered Knowledge Graph Construction
web_sources.use: Recent survey of LLM-based ontology engineering, extraction, and fusion.

web_sources.title: Pan et al., Large Language Models and Knowledge Graphs
web_sources.use: Position paper on explicit KGs and parametric knowledge in LLMs.

local_sources.title: Theseus README
local_sources.use: Defines Theseus as principle extraction, algorithm execution, and accountable bets.

local_sources.title: Algorithmized Decision Making
local_sources.use: Defines traces, rule graphs, investable outputs, and metric contracts.

local_sources.title: Claim extractor implementation
local_sources.use: Shows the JSON claim/principle extraction contract and external-claim filtering.

local_sources.title: Embedding pipeline implementation
local_sources.use: Shows how source text is embedded and written into the canonical store.

local_sources.title: Canonical contradiction engine
local_sources.use: Householder reflection, Hoyer sparsity, reliability calibration, and limits.

local_sources.title: Bayesian Belief Layer
local_sources.use: Derived Bayesian network over the cascade graph.
